languages.text: "Незамедлительно, Ваша Светлость. Судьбу дозорных мы обсудим с вами в другой раз, но можете считать, что это большой шаг в укреплении отношений с {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизицией{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Незамедлительно, Ваша Светлость. Судьбу дозорных мы обсудим с вами в другой раз, но можете считать, что это большой шаг в укреплении отношений с {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизицией{/g}".

languages.text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Незамедлительно, Ваша Светлость. Судьбу дозорных мы обсудим с вами в другой раз, но можете считать, что это большой шаг в укреплении отношений с {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизицией{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the Inquisition."
"Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the Inquisition."
"Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the Inquisition."

languages.text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}。時計の運命はまた別の機会に話しますが、これは{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}宗教裁判所{/g}との関係強化に向けた大きな一歩だと考えてください」
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}。時計の運命はまた別の機会に話しますが、これは宗教裁判所との関係強化に向けた大きな一歩だと考えてください。」
「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|殿}。時計の運命はまた別の機会に話しますが、これは{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}宗教裁判所{/g}との関係強化に向けた大きな一歩だと考えてください」

languages.text: «Inmediatamente, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Hablaremos del destino de la guardia más adelante, pero esto representa un fuerte acercamiento de posiciones con la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}».
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Inmediatamente, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Hablaremos del destino de la guardia más adelante, pero esto representa un fuerte acercamiento de posiciones con la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}».

languages.text: “立即执行，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}。至于监视哨站的命运，我们稍后再议。但此举无疑是巩固与{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}关系的一大步。”
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “立即执行，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}。至于监视哨站的命运，我们稍后再议。但此举无疑是巩固与{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}关系的一大步。”

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Über das Schicksal der Wache reden wir ein andermal, aber das ist ein wichtiger Schritt zur Stärkung der Beziehungen mit der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Über das Schicksal der Wache reden wir ein andermal, aber das ist ein wichtiger Schritt zur Stärkung der Beziehungen mit der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

languages.text: "Derhâl {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Nöbetin kaderinini başka bir zaman tartışırız ancak bu, {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} ile ilişkileri güçlendirme yolunda büyük bir adım olarak görülebilir."
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Derhâl {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Nöbetin kaderinini başka bir zaman tartışırız ancak bu, {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} ile ilişkileri güçlendirme yolunda büyük bir adım olarak görülebilir."

languages.text: « Tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie. Nous discuterons du sort des sentinelles plus tard, mais considérez ceci comme une avancée majeure dans le renforcement de vos relations avec l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Without delay, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I will discuss the fate of the watch with you another time, but you may consider this a major step toward strengthening relations with the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie. Nous discuterons du sort des sentinelles plus tard, mais considérez ceci comme une avancée majeure dans le renforcement de vos relations avec l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}. »
